name: Spaghetti Sauce of Three Meats
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken, cut into bite-sized pieces
1 lb Pork, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large pot over medium heat and add enough oil to coat the bottom. Brown the beef pieces until browned on all sides.
2. Add the chicken pieces and brown them until cooked through.
3. Increase the heat to high and add the pork pieces, cooking until browned.
4. Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the crushed garlic and cook for another minute.
6. Add the tomato paste and stir well.
7. Pour in the canned tomatoes (with juices) and bay leaves. Stir to combine.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 1.5 to 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
10. Stir in the chopped parsley and lemon juice just before serving.
11. Cook spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente.
12. Heat the Italian meatballs until heated through.
13. Slice any excess meat from the sauce and mix it with the sauce.
14. Combine the cooked spaghetti with the sauce and meatballs.
15. Serve hot, garnished with extra parsley if desired.
16. This recipe freezes well for later use.
